summary: No breaking API changes in Sprint 9. The portfolios.py split into portfolio_holdings.py + portfolio_transactions.py + portfolios.py is purely internal — all existing endpoint URLs remain unchanged. main.py registers all 3 routers with the same /portfolios prefix so no client-facing paths changed. analytics.py shim preserves the invalidate_analytics_cache import contract. No endpoints were removed, renamed, or had their request/response schemas changed. New feature: analytics sections have ErrorBoundary wrapping on frontend — transparent to API consumers.

checks.name: portfolio endpoints
checks.detail: All /portfolios/* URLs unchanged, served from split modules

checks.name: analytics endpoints
checks.detail: All /analytics/* URLs unchanged, shim re-exports intact
